languages.text: {n}Несмотря на то, что передаваемые коды устарели на века, вы понимаете: в них полк {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} просит о помощи и сообщает о невозможности отступить с позиции.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Несмотря на то, что передаваемые коды устарели на века, вы понимаете: в них полк {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} просит о помощи и сообщает о невозможности отступить с позиции.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Несмотря на то, что передаваемые коды устарели на века, вы понимаете: в них полк {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g} просит о помощи и сообщает о невозможности отступить с позиции.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

{n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an Astra Militarum regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

{n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an Astra Militarum regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

languages.text: {n}送信されているコードは数百年も前のものだが、あなたは意味がわかる。アストラ・ミリタムの連隊が支援を要請し、現在の位置からの撤退は不可能だと報告している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an Astra Militarum regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İletilen kodlar yüzyıllar öncesine ait olsa da ne anlama geldiklerini çözebiliyorsun. Yardım isteyen bir {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} alayı, mevcut konumlarından geri çekilmenin imkânsız olduğunu bildiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İletilen kodlar yüzyıllar öncesine ait olsa da ne anlama geldiklerini çözebiliyorsun. Yardım isteyen bir {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} alayı, mevcut konumlarından geri çekilmenin imkânsız olduğunu bildiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}尽管传输的代码早已过时数百年，你仍能解读其中含义：一支{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}团正在请求援助，并报告从当前位置已无法撤离。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}尽管传输的代码早已过时数百年，你仍能解读其中含义：一支{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}团正在请求援助，并报告从当前位置已无法撤离。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Obwohl die übertragenen Codes seit Jahrhunderten veraltet sind, kannst du sie entschlüsseln. Ein Regiment des {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} erbittet Unterstützung und meldet, dass von seiner aktuellen Position kein Rückzug möglich ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Obwohl die übertragenen Codes seit Jahrhunderten veraltet sind, kannst du sie entschlüsseln. Ein Regiment des {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} erbittet Unterstützung und meldet, dass von seiner aktuellen Position kein Rückzug möglich ist.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bien que les codes transmis datent de plusieurs siècles, vous êtes en mesure de les déchiffrer : un régiment de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} appelle à l'aide et signale qu'il lui est impossible de battre en retraite depuis sa position actuelle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bien que les codes transmis datent de plusieurs siècles, vous êtes en mesure de les déchiffrer : un régiment de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} appelle à l'aide et signale qu'il lui est impossible de battre en retraite depuis sa position actuelle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aunque los códigos que transmite llevan siglos de desfase, logras interpretarlos. Un regimiento del {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} solicita ayuda urgente e informa de que no puede retirarse de su posición actual.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Although the codes being transmitted are centuries out of date, you are able to make sense of them: an {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} regiment is requesting assistance and reporting that retreat from their present position is impossible.{/n}
